case_payload.summary: Looking-Glass identifies an upstream bridge (reserve depletion before visible shock). The adjustment layer receives this diagnosis and reweights forward paths from the current damaged state.
case_payload.claim_attempt: The upstream bridge detected by Looking-Glass informs the adjustment layer to reweight paths from the depleted state, not just the visible symptom.

why: Looking-Glass detects an upstream bridge (reserve depletion before visible shock)
Adjustment layer reweights paths from the depleted state, not just the visible symptom
